linkHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
authPrompt: Please log in or register to access the Dashboard.
phDesc: Analyze storage conditions to predict spoilage risk and minimize losses.
lsDesc: Upload a photo of a crop leaf to detect early signs of diseases.
lsUploadPrompt: Click or Drag & Drop to Upload Image
chatDesc: Ask questions about your crops, weather, or farming practices.
chatError: Sorry, I am having trouble connecting to the server.
eduDesc: Simple guide to understand what crops need.
eduNAns: Nitrogen helps leaves grow green and healthy.
eduExText: If 1 acre needs 50 kg fertilizer and 1 bag = 45 kg, You need approximately 2 bags.
budgetDesc: Plan your farming expenses based on your available budget.
budgetMessageSufficient: You have ₹{total} budget. Estimated cost is ₹{cost}. You will have ₹{remaining} remaining.
budgetMessageInsufficient: Your budget is low for this crop. Consider reducing fertilizer or changing crop.
yieldDesc: Estimate expected crop yield and revenue based on conditions.
yieldExplanation: Based on your soil and water availability, you can expect around {yield} quintals, generating an estimated revenue of {revenue}.
fertDesc: Get specific fertilizer advice based on NPK values or visual symptoms.
fertRecommendExplanation: Based on your input, your farm has {deficiency}. We recommend using {fertilizer}. You will need {total} kg for your entire land.
diseaseDesc: Select currently observed symptoms to identify possible diseases and get treatment advice.
diseaseAdviceExplanation: Based on the symptoms, we suspect {issue}. Treatment involves {treatment} with an estimated cost of ₹{cost}.
crDesc: Discover the most profitable crop to grow based on your field conditions in simple terms.
cropRecommendFail: We couldn't find an exact match for your combination. Try adjusting season or water levels.
cropRecommendSuccess: Here are the top crop options for your farm.
cropAdvWheat: Wheat thrives in cool weather. Great choice with decent moisture.
cropAdvRice: Rice needs plenty of water. Excellent if you have good irrigation.
cropAdvTomato: Tomatoes grow fast and can give quick returns. Watch out for pests.
cropAdvOnion: Onions are sturdy and store well. Good cash crop.
cropAdvMillets: Millets require very little water and are very hardy. Safe bet.
cropAdvGroundnut: Groundnuts are great for sandy soil and fix nitrogen.
mktDesc: Check current average market prices to decide where to sell your harvest.
mktPriceSuccess: Based on current trends, your total harvest is valued around ₹{value} at top markets.
mktAdvWheat: Wheat prices are stable. District markets often provide fair margins without high transport costs.
mktAdvRice: High demand. Consider selling at State markets if transport cost is lower than the price difference.
mktAdvTomato: Highly perishable. Only target farther markets if you have access to cold chain transport.
mktAdvPotato: Prices are currently steady. Can be kept in cold storage if local prices are too low.
mktAdvOnion: Demand is high. State wholesale markets are currently giving the best returns.
mktAdvMillets: Specialty crop. Look for direct buyers or state-level aggregators for maximum profit.
phAdvNormal: Conditions are stable. Continue monitoring regularly.
phAdvTomatoTemp: Warning: Tomato stored above 25°C degrades rapidly. Reduce temperature or sell quickly.
phAdvTomatoHum: High humidity detected. Ensure proper ventilation to prevent fungal growth on tomatoes.
phAdvPotatoTemp: Potatoes sprouting risk is high at this temperature. Move to colder storage.
phAdvPotatoHum: Reduce humidity to prevent potato rotting.
phAdvOnionTemp: Onions are sweating too much at this heat. Spoilage risk rising.
phAdvOnionHum: Onions need dry conditions. Very high rotting risk at this moisture level.
phAdvWheatTemp: Wheat is getting too warm, risking pest infestation.
phAdvWheatHum: Moisture level is too high for wheat. Drying required immediately to prevent mold.
phAdvRiceTemp: Rice grain quality may suffer at prolonged high temperature storage.
phAdvRiceHum: Rice grains will clump and grow mold. Requires drying urgently.
disease_summary: Based on the symptoms, we suspect {disease}. Treatment involves {treatment} with an estimated cost of ₹{cost}.
Apply sulfur-based fungicides or neem oi: Apply sulfur-based fungicides or neem oil.
Remove and destroy infected plants. Fung: Remove and destroy infected plants. Fungicides are generally ineffective once infected.
Apply acaricides or horticultural oils. Introduce predatory mites.
No cure. Destroy infected plants immedia: No cure. Destroy infected plants immediately.
Consult a local agricultural extension o: Consult a local agricultural extension officer.
